collatz.shell: h(n)=floor(log2 n); rung = parity bit; q=ln(3/2) or ln(1/2)

escape_realisation.note: all-ones (max-escape) word realised by a positive integer; its longer trajectory's ones-fraction drops back toward/below threshold -- escape not sustained, but NOT forbidden at finite length

collatz.certificate_class_conclusion: Rung grammar = full one-sided shift (Terras bijection, verified). Every finite escape word is admissible & realised. => NO finite rung-word automaton can certify Collatz closure (nothing to forbid). Any certificate must be GLOBAL over the realised 2-adic measure = the open conjecture.
collatz.mode: DISSIPATIVE-ON-AVERAGE (mean drift = ln(3/2)*0.5+ln(1/2)*0.5 < 0 over the uniform 2-adic measure where ones-fraction->1/2 < threshold), but NOT certifiable by a finite automaton
collatz.status: MEDIUM PASS: recovers Terras 1976 + draws the certificate-class exclusion (NEW framing); no new theorem about Collatz; wall localised, not removed

stable_contraction.certificate: Lyapunov form B (rho<1): inward shell drift

escaping_rho>1.certificate: none: rho>1, orbits leave every magnitude shell

isometric_rotation.certificate: invariant inner product (rho=1, diagonalizable): bounded shells

markov.certificate: spectral gap 1-|lambda_2|>0 + stationary measure pi (contraction on mean-zero)

navier_stokes._honest: capacity trend robust; sign-crossing scheme-dependent (not a critical-exponent claim)
